about: Hello everyone, Im Fernando Vunge, known online as fevunge! I'm a young developer from Luanda, Angola!
I started studying computer science studies in 2020, both academically and self-study.
I corruntly focused on programming and systems architecture.
In 2025, after finishing high school, I became a cadet at the 42 School! Since then, I've built several projects focused on computer science and problem-solving.

I have over a year of experience contributing to open-source projects, collaborating with three local startups, and working at medium-sized company where i develop solutions using microservices, system design, database architecture, APIs, and a lot of DevOps practices.
